docs.description: “赋格的艺术” 自笔谱的初期稿 -- 高桥悠治         这个演奏是基于克里斯托夫·沃尔夫的校订，由C.F.Peters在1986年首次出版的巴赫的“赋格的艺术”自笔谱（柏林德国国家图书馆所藏的巴赫自笔谱P200）而进行的。          根据出版谱上所附的沃尔夫的序文，这并非巴赫未完成的最后器乐曲的初版（1752年）的草稿，而是完结的初期形式的清书稿，写于1740年代初。 实际的作曲年代不得而知，但也有可能在1740年以前。          最初的三首赋格（1至3，无题）是简单对位法，接下来的五首（4至8）是二重对位法，在主题的上方和下方将其转位形式或与新的固定对位(或对题，即countersubject)与之组合。 第9首是由主题的变化形式构成的八度无终卡农。 接着是分别伴有两个和三个固定对位(countersubject)的二重和三重对位法构成的两首赋格，再后来是一首无终的逆行、扩大的卡农，最后以一系列使用简单对位法和二重对位法的镜像赋格结束。          赋格并非像奏鸣曲形式那样的音乐形式，而是一门将给定的旋律展开成多样的多声部织体的技法（艺术）。 这个初期稿的乐章排列非常讲究逻辑顺序，原始主题在跟随着乐章的进展，其节奏和对位的复杂性逐渐增加。但在现行的版本中，各曲几乎没有改变，顺序则是根据赋格的类型被重新排列和组合了。

docs.creator: Marcoux Jean-François
docs.description: ONTOGONIE DU FLUX — Duos pour Violon & Guitare (Compositions Originales) arrangements pour cette pièce de JS Bach  ​ Cette publication contieient Le MP3 interprété au violon et à la guitare classique Ramirez par Annabelle Marcoux et Jean-François (Lades Neffous) La partition en un PDF avec la mélodie pour le violon et en notation américaine. Cette série d'enregistrements présente un ensemble de compositions personnelles écrites pour duo de violon et guitare (classique ou folk selon les sessions). Les partitions de ces œuvres sont par ailleurs disponibles et répertoriées sur la plateforme Free-scores.com . ​Ce répertoire est interprété en duo par la jeune violoniste Annabelle (17 ans) et le compositeur Jean-François Marcoux à la guitare. ​Le corpus se compose de ballades, de romances et de mélodies d'une grande profondeur expressive, spécifiquement adaptées à la sensibilité et à la technique d'une adolescente. Afin d'offrir un cadre d'expression sûr, stable et structurant, l'écriture s'inscrit volontairement dans un système rigoureusement tonal. Les arrangements adoptent une facture claire et de style classique (volontairement académique), conçus comme des repères solides pour guider le jeu du violoniste et éviter toute dérive ou perte de repères dans l'exécution. En écartant l'abstraction de l'atonalité, ce cycle privilégie l'immédiatesse de la ligne mélodique et le dialogue direct entre l'archet et les cordes pincées. Captées dans la pureté de l'instant, ces pièces allient l'exigence de la transmission formative à la vérité acoustique du flux musical par partagé

docs.creator: Vampire Weekend
docs.description: The self-titled debut Vampire Weekend establishes the group’s signature blend of indie rock and afro-pop influences, built on bright guitar lines, buoyant rhythms, and tight, minimal arrangements. The album mixes academic references, dry humor, and crisp pop formalism, resulting in a sound defined by melodic clarity and rhythmic precision. Though deceptively light, it introduced an uncommon rhythmic and harmonic palette to mid-2000s indie rock and helped define both the band’s identity and a broader movement toward stylistic cross-pollination within alternative music.
subject: indie rock
afro-pop
baroque pop
alternative rock
art pop
college rock
docs.title: Vampire Weekend

docs.creator: Vampire Weekend
docs.description: Modern Vampires of the City marks Vampire Weekend’s move toward a more mature and restrained indie-rock aesthetic, toning down the earlier afro-pop flash in favor of chamber-like arrangements and meticulous studio construction. The record weaves pianos, organs, processed choirs, and subtle rhythmic manipulations while addressing themes of time, faith, urban anxiety, and mortality. Produced by Rostam Batmanglij and Ariel Rechtshaid, it blends precise textural design with accessible melodic writing, creating a balance between minimalism and layered detail. It stands as the band’s most conceptually unified and critically refined release.

docs.title: Modern Vampires of the City

docs.creator: Sérgio Sampaio
docs.description: Tem Que Acontecer é o segundo álbum de Sérgio Sampaio, lançado em 1976. Produzido com arranjos assinados por João de Aquino e Lindolfo Gaya, o disco mescla MPB e elementos do rock brasileiro com instrumentação rica — piano, sopros e percussão — e foco na composição e na voz do autor. Registro representativo do período, combina canção urbana e elaboração instrumental cuidada. Tem Que Acontecer is Sérgio Sampaio’s second album, released in 1976. Produced with arrangements by João de Aquino and Lindolfo Gaya, the record blends MPB and Brazilian rock with lush instrumentation — piano, horns and percussion — emphasizing songwriting and vocal delivery. It stands as a notable example of mid-1970s Brazilian popular music combining urban songcraft and refined arrangements.

docs.creator: Sam France
docs.description: Released February 28th 2022 Hoarse Galorēs is a mostly acoustic album that lives in a Tolkienian Middle Earth where Mickey Mouse skips rope with Jesus Christ and Bob Dylan. Worship songs from the church of the Psychedelic Special Children. Hoarse Galorēs is the first release from the Sam France "Lost Album" series. Bear witness to Sam's 2019 Christian Freak Folk epic that never left the reel canister after it was recorded mostly in live takes with producer Kevin Basko (the brilliant and prolific Rubber Band Gun) in his basement in New Jersey. -Credits- Sam France; Vocals, Guitar, Piano, Drums Kevin Basko; Drums, Guitar, Vocals, Percussion Emily Moales; Electric Bass, Guitar, Vocals, Percussion Rias Reed; Drums, Organ, Percussion Riley Byrne; Upright Bass Recorded, Mixed, & Mastered by Kevin Basko Engineered by Kevin Basko and Rias Reed All songs written by Sam France

docs.creator: Sam France
docs.description: Released January 2008 "God is Real", Sam's religious rock album from high school, Made during a senior year descent into religious mania in 2008, God is Real is essential foxy-world psych folk. All songs written + performed by Sam France on Garageband in 2008. Remastered by Jonathan Rado in the June of 2022.
